name: Croatia
style_of_play: Controlled possession with technical midfielders and patient build-up, transitioning quickly when space opens.
weaknesses: lack of pace in wide areas
tactical_summary: Circulate the ball through the midfield trio to draw opponents out; fullbacks provide width while the striker drops to link play. Rarely commit more than four to the box defensively.
why_it_matters: Croatia's ability to control tempo and manage knockout-game moments makes them perennial overperformers on the world stage.
injury_news: Placeholder — squad fitness updates to follow.
